- [x] Customize the Project - Add dashboard, inventory, sales features

## Project Overview

**Mobile Inventory Management Web Application**

A Next.js application for managing used Android phones and keypad phones inventory for a mobile phone shop.

**Key Features:**
- Dashboard with statistics (total phones, sold phones, profit)
- Add/Edit/Delete phones with detailed information
- Seller and buyer details management
- Inventory search and filtering
- Sales history tracking with profit calculations
- Mobile-responsive design with Tailwind CSS
